2606.31963.title: Signed-Permutation Coordinate Transport for RMSNorm Transformers
2606.31963.paper_summary: Modern LLM workflows move coordinate-indexed objects across checkpoints: steering vectors, sparse autoencoders, top-$k$ neuron sets, attribution lists, and merge alignments. This is only well posed after fixing the model's residual-stream gauge, which we show is architecture-dependent: LayerNorm residual charts have permutation gauge $S_d$ (up to a global sign flip), while RMSNorm charts with generic per-channel gain have signed-permutation gauge $B_d = S_d \ltimes \{\pm 1\}^d$. Permutation-only alignment is therefore symmetry-incomplete for RMSNorm models. We introduce sign-marginalized Hungarian matching and prove a sharp failure mode: with decorrelated coordinates, raw signed-correlation matching has a structural permutation-accuracy ceiling at the positive-sign fraction of the true gauge, which sign-marginalization removes. We then make coordinate-preserving transport, not function-level merging, the primary object: composing saved-checkpoint local $B_d$ gauges along same-base fine-tuning trajectories recovers 91.1% of cross-run coordinates at 1500 steps versus 60.3% for endpoint matching, and the gain is not explained by merely routing through the base. The recovered gauge transfers tools that permutation-only alignment breaks: TinyLlama SAE reconstruction has NMSE 0.004 under $B_d$ versus 1.08 under $S_d$; Qwen sentiment steering preserves 95.8% of its effect versus 17.2%; refusal steering reverses sign under $S_d$; coordinate-preserving merges behave the same way. The same covariance governs stateful training: signed transport of AdamW state preserves the resumed trajectory, while permutation-only state follows a different one from a functionally identical checkpoint. Finally, gauge-sweep audits show index-level interpretability claims are reproducible only relative to an explicit gauge.
2606.31963.paper_summary_zh: 現代 LLM 工作流程在檢查點之間移動坐標索引對象：引導向量、稀疏自編碼器、前 $k$ 神經元集合、歸因列表和合併對齊。這只有在修正模型的殘差流量規範後才是合理的，我們顯示這是依賴於架構的：LayerNorm 殘差圖的置換規範為 $S_d$（最多翻轉全局符號），而具有通用每通道增益的 RMSNorm 圖則具有簽名置換規範 $B_d = S_d \ltimes \{\pm 1\}^d$。因此，僅置換對齊對於 RMSNorm 模型來說是不對稱的。我們引入簽名邊際匈牙利匹配並證明了一種明確的失效模式：在去相關的坐標下，原始簽名相關匹配在真實規範的正符號比例上有結構性置換準確性上限，而簽名邊際化則消除了這一限制。然後，我們將坐標保持的運輸，而不是功能級別的合併，作為主要對象：沿著相同基礎微調軌跡組合保存的檢查點局部 $B_d$ 規範，在 1500 步時恢復了 91.1% 的跨運行坐標，相較於端點匹配的 60.3%，而這一增益並不能僅僅通過路由基礎來解釋。恢復的規範轉移了僅置換對齊所破壞的工具：在 $B_d$ 下，TinyLlama SAE 重建的 NMSE 為 0.004，而在 $S_d$ 下為 1.08；Qwen 情感引導保持了 95.8% 的效果，而 17.2%；拒絕引導在 $S_d$ 下翻轉符號；坐標保持的合併行為相同。相同的協方差統治有狀態訓練：AdamW 狀態的簽名運輸保持了恢復的軌跡，而僅置換的狀態則遵循來自功能上相同的檢查點的不同軌跡。最後，規範掃描審計顯示，索引級別的可解釋性聲明僅相對於明確的規範是可重現的。
2606.31963.author: John Sweeney et.al.
